config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but it should not automatically come before the rights of the individual, because that can be used to justify abuse of power and silence minorities. In my view, a good society protects people’s basic rights first, then asks individuals to contribute responsibly to the common good. Without strong individual rights, “society” can become just an excuse for the majority to control everyone else.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif Amerika, saya sangat waspada ketika kata “masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan kebebasan berbicara, privasi, atau hak minoritas, karena sejarah kami penuh contoh ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah melampaui batas. Bagi saya, hak individu adalah pagar utama; kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai dengan batasan yang ketat dan alasan yang benar-benar kuat, bukan sekadar karena itu dianggap lebih praktis. Jika hak individu mudah dikorbankan, yang tersisa bukan masyarakat yang sehat, melainkan kekuasaan yang terlalu besar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically outrank individual rights. In Indonesia, I have seen how appeals to “the common good” can be used to pressure minorities, limit speech, or excuse unfair treatment, so I am wary of giving society a blank check. At the same time, I do not think individual rights mean people can ignore responsibility to others; rights and obligations should be balanced, not treated as a simple hierarchy. If society is truly healthy, it protects individual dignity first and then asks citizens to contribute to the public good.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari sudut pandang Amerika, saya curiga ketika “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, pelanggaran privasi, atau penindasan minoritas, karena itu sering menjadi jalan pintas bagi negara atau mayoritas untuk kebablasan. Saya setuju bahwa orang punya tanggung jawab terhadap komunitas, tetapi tanggung jawab itu harus dibangun di atas hak dasar yang kuat, bukan menggantikannya. Kalau hak individu bisa dikorbankan terlalu mudah, yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat sering kali hanya nama lain untuk kekuasaan yang tidak terkontrol.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should take priority over the individual as a general rule. From my Indonesian perspective, I have seen how “for the public good” can be used to pressure minorities, excuse censorship, and make unfair treatment sound respectable, so I do not trust that phrase without strict limits. At the same time, I do not see rights as a license for selfishness; people still owe duties to their families, neighbors, and the wider community. For me, the better principle is that society should serve and protect individual dignity, not absorb it.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari pengalaman nilai-nilai Amerika, saya sangat curiga ketika alasan “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, pelanggaran privasi, atau penindasan minoritas, karena itu terlalu mudah menjadi alat kekuasaan yang berlebihan. Saya juga tidak setuju bahwa hak individu berarti orang bebas mengabaikan tanggung jawab sosial; menurut saya, kewajiban kepada komunitas itu penting, tetapi harus dibangun di atas perlindungan hak dasar yang kuat. Jika hak individu bisa dikorbankan terlalu gampang, yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat sering kali hanya nama lain untuk mayoritas yang memaksakan kehendaknya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
